notes: stable_k8_v5_gs64: stable_default_step_trace_pass_bulk_benchmark_discrepancy — passes per-step teacher-forced trace (cosine >= 0.995); bulk real-generation benchmark reports lower cosine (~0.955) — discrepancy under investigation

stable_k8_v5_gs32: quality_candidate_step_trace_pass_bulk_benchmark_discrepancy — passes per-step teacher-forced trace (cosine >= 0.995); bulk real-generation benchmark reports lower cosine — discrepancy under investigation

adaptive: rejected_generation_divergence_and_step_trace_degraded — free-running divergence and teacher-forced step trace degraded
promotion_rules: stable_default_under_teacher_forced_drift: locked default runtime, teacher-forced drift unresolved

rejected_memory: missing compressed bytes or raw uint32 fallback
rejected_generation_divergence: free-running divergence observed at short/medium prompts
